calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christopher Milton, Esq., (818) 779-0981 for petitioner. Rachelle Obiacoro, Company Representative for Petitioner Enterprise Rent-A-Car also present.
John Shanley, Esq., (415) 554-4692, for respondent San Francisco Police Department.

IN CAMERA, Evidentiary Hearing on Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

San Francisco Police Inspector Antonio L. Cassillas sworn and examined on behalf of the respondent. Cross-examination by Petitioner. Direct examination by the Court. Redirect examination by Respondent.
Respondents' Exhibit #1-Unit Order is identified.

John Shanley sworn and examined on his own behalf and cross-examined by Petitioner.

Upon termination of witness testimony, counsel ARGUE and SUBMIT.

COURT DENIES PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Court orders return of exhibit to counsel. Court orders per diem fee of $140.00 to be paid by Petitioner. Respondent is Exempt.

Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Joseph Vickstein CSR# 4780

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Continued To Apr-26-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christopher R. Milton, Esq. , 818-779-0981, for Petitioner, Moving Party, Enterprise Rent A Car Company. John Shanley and John Hart, Esq. for Respondent, Opposing Party, San Francisco Police Department

RULING:
PETITIONER ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to 4/26/05 at 3:30pm for Evidentury Hearing, In Camera with Police Officer. (301/JLW/SL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
